name: article-reader
description: Article Reader Helper — interactive forcing-question reading skill for Claude Code

metadata.description: Interactive reading companion that forces active digestion through Socratic questioning. Reads articles segment by segment, asks forcing questions, surfaces relevant notes from your Obsidian vault, and writes the resulting dialogue back as a markdown note.

plugins.name: article-reader
plugins.description: Article reader skill. Use /article-reader <url or text> to start a forcing-question reading session.
